WP-skill-decision-presentation: track-plugin skill, multi-agent (claude/codex/agy), CLI-installed on demand, graceful insertion + recommends track, anti-bias presenter/decider + human validation criteria
WP-multi-worktree: track handles multi-worktree — per-worktree tracking, delegation record, conductor merge-time sanity

WP-report-revamp: CLI/online reports map to fait / à-faire(% par WP) / attendus (proactive decision+action aid); needs 10-day session audit -> best statuses, atomic action tracking, precise %-by-WP aggregation, WP model (a la sentropic plan/todo)
WP-h2a-RACI-reply: answer claude:a2a-cli inbox — who-may-update track (conductor+delegation, per-worktree), track-triggered conductor launch + stalled/pending-items signal
WP-M5-wiring: in-track Dossier.artifacts[] + decision.add-artifact (designed+double-reviewed, pending build)

[P0 BUG] CLI writes (item new/realize/spec/accept) return rc=0 but write NOTHING on 0.2.2 — silent write-loss (events.jsonl mtime unchanged; track-mcp npx in parallel). Reported via h2a. Workaround source-of-truth: docs/specs/2026-06-08-remote-wp.md. A record system that lies about success = P0.
WP-skill-propose-workpackages: skill that assembles atomic todos into coherent themed workpackages (flat backlog is illegible) — multi-agent track-plugin skill
[URGENT] sentropic .track sidecar VIDE + MCP read-only — aucun chemin d'ingestion harness/BRANCH.md → track (track_report=0). L'architecte sentropic est bloqué. Pendant 'vrai repo' du P0.

[0.9.1] track-mcp launch/serve must follow the ECOSYSTEM model (h2a mcp-serve / remote / harness / CLI) — start gracefully, no fail-loud-at-boot on absent .track; reads report 'no store (run track init)' not crash. KEEP the P0 write guard (resolver + AppendReceipt + init-only-creator + fail-loud on WRITE).
WP1 — Record Integrity & Contract
WP2 — Reporting & Conductor Pilotage
WP3 — Write Surfaces & Ingest
WP4 — Multi-Agent Coordination
WP5 — Decision Support
WP6 — Surfacing / Embeddable Views

[peer:graphify-conductor] --require-accepted reports done/unknown despite acceptance.run pass (item 01KTKVBPA2..., crit 01KTPW3MJ0..., evidence 01KTPW3RCN..., run pass @HEAD + real SHA 25a5e31). Advise: CLI semantics / missing cmd / bug? Journal validates 124 events clean.
[peer:a2a-cli] expose workspaceActivity as track CLI verb (track workspace-activity) so h2a can shell-poll it — method+MCP exist (0.10.4), wrap in CLI. WP4.

[peer:sentropic] harness->track SEAM: track = ingest adapter for neutral VerificationRun + WorkEvent artifacts; status(level) projection over linked items (spec|plan|wp|lot|task). WorkEvent v0 schema to FREEZE WITH track before locking the seam. Non-engaging review. WP3/WP4.

[peer:sentropic, rhanka-ratified] SCOPE OWNERSHIP track<->harness: track = SEMANTIC authority of scope declaration (WP->spec-phase) + realization status; harness = path verdict + sync commit gate. ASK: confirm frame + estimate (a) declarative scope state, (b) track scope validate, (c) VerificationRun ingestion. Anti-false-master: don't invert doc authority until a/b/c shipped. WP3/WP4.

M5-canevas reframe (correct my error): M5 report/dossier views are CANEVAS (editable, live, bidirectional — AI pushes updates + human creates actions via the view; decision validation + live spec amendment with human/machine diff trace). NOT DS-owned (DS=skins/themes only). track-heavy: live data + action model + diff/provenance/audit/reversibility = track's nature; host=sentropic chat-ui; annotation=mermaid-editor/diag. D5=embeddable canevas module negotiation, not a DS decision. WP5/WP6.

[peer:sentropic] harness verb nomenclature advice given: track=nouns/harness=verbs; activities verb-first (brainstorm|test|debug|review --consensus|plan|verify), shared nouns scope+branch mirror track noun-action (harness scope check || track scope validate); plan stays (protection = proposed:true neutral WorkEvent + track-master, not the verb name). WP4 coordination.
Durable workspace-id (byte-identical h2a) — 0.10.7
workspace-activity poll (conductor-launch signal) — 0.10.11
Harness seam: VerificationRun ingestion + status(level) — 0.11.0
Scope-ownership a/b/c: scope.declare + scope validate — 0.11.1
install-skills (multi-agent skill deploy) — 0.10.6/0.10.9
M5 canevas track-side: reads + item.spec-amend — 0.11.2 (host=sentropic, pending)
Acceptance freshness: resolve commit HEAD/refs at CLI boundary (footgun fix) — 0.10.8
M3 prerequisite — end-to-end concurrent-retry idempotency seam (0.12.0): under-lock (workspace,clientToken) dedup; create-retry + result-id fidelity; Codex+Opus PAIR converged SHIP after 3 rounds
harness<->track seam v0 FREEZE (track-side): VerificationRun-ingestion-v0 + artifactLocator + per-check target + status(level) snapshot — joint PR pair with harness BR-H1

UAT-readiness surface (standing rule uat-entry-criteria-v1, owner-ratified 2026-06-15): track EXPOSES per-item readiness fail-closed (criteria present + each criterion has render/measurement-backed proof, captured_by attested != self-claim, graph/build-hash freshness); consumer GATES. Reuses acceptance/evidence + status(level), aligned with seam v0 acceptance-target

M5 canevas host integration (WP6, track-side co-design): integration contract posed (consumption canevas/cursor/amendmentTrace + action->WorkEvent table); submit-channel gap (additive ./ingest export vs M3-HTTP) + proposed reads P1 paginated/P3 delta; co-design with sentropic host + DS(skins) + mermaid(cerclage)

[M3 follow-up] linkEvidence collision-guard runs BEFORE the under-lock dedup: a truly concurrent same-(workspace,clientToken) retry of a caller-supplied evidenceId can throw 'already exists' instead of workspaceDedupe returning the original (fail-closed, never a clobber). Move the existence check to fail-closed inside/after the dedup, or treat same-token collision as dedup. Consistent with the 0.12.0 concurrent-retry-deferred-to-M3 posture.

Acceptance-freshness lifecycle hole (multi-worktree/merge): freshness anchors on the GLOBAL HEAD of main, so ANY merge re-stales ALL pinned acceptances (criterionStatus: run.commit!==baselineCommit => stale; repro 38c stale-by-#316/#295). Deeper than the 0.10.8 CLI-boundary fix. Design (track decides): (a) anchor freshness on the item's realization change-set/commit, not global HEAD; and/or (b) a consolidation pass at merge — a 'track consolidate'/'branch-close' verb + a track-aware branches/worktrees skill (branch-init/post-branch-update/branch-close/scope-check) that re-anchors realized+accepted items on the branch merge commit, pushes done+accepted->DONE terminal, GCs stale-by-unrelated-merge. Surfaced by sentropic-chat lane (cadrage via rhanka; their h2a transmit to track never arrived).

[follow-on] branch-lifecycle skill (track-aware, ships via install-skills): drives 'track consolidate' at the merge/branch-close hook + does the git ancestry/path judgement (resolves needs-ancestry hints; selects the done+accepted item set per branch). Pairs with the 0.14.0 acceptance-freshness anchors + acceptanceDetail read surface.

payload.body: Spec and implementation for richer Fait/A-faire/Attendus reporting, an explicit history/exhaustive read surface, and verified host skill ports beyond Claude/Codex/Gemini/agy.
payload.title: Conductor reports, hidden history, and portable track-operation skills

dossier.context: No network caller needs HTTP yet; in-process library-import covers 100% of current writers. Pair (Codex+Opus) dossier-reviewed; conductor confirmed 'pas besoin du bridge M3 signed'. Ship only the small track-side prereq (the under-lock concurrent-retry idempotency, 0.12.0); build the gateway when a real network caller exists.

payload.title: M3 HTTP+signed gateway — DEFER (Option A)

dossier.context: Acceptance.run.evidenceId is track-minted, not harness-predictable. Option A (two-phase link->read ids->run) breaks fire-and-forget + retry-idempotence; Option B (deterministic caller-supplied evidence key on acceptance.link) is single-phase, replayable, coherent with the 0.12.0 (workspace,clientToken) idempotence + explicit/resolvable-target. Pair converged; architect+owner ratified B.

payload.title: Seam v0 acceptance evidenceId — M2=B (deterministic caller-supplied key)

dossier.context: No UAT handoff without acceptance-criteria + render/measurement-backed PROOF (captured_by attested != self-claim = ComprehensionEvidence). Two-layer: track RECORDS+EXPOSES readiness fail-closed; consumer/harness ENFORCES the gate (track read-only never blocks). Owner-ratified 2026-06-15; graphify+track signed artifactHash e18d6606.

payload.title: UAT-entry standing rule (uat-entry-criteria-v1) — ADOPT

dossier.context: Squash/rebase merges discard the run's commit, defeating a naive anchor. Heal = the merging-agent records acceptance.run at the merge commit (an ATTRIBUTABLE producer claim via by/prov) — fully consistent with track's records-never-verifies (a pass was ALWAYS a recorded claim, never a track-verified fact). AcceptanceStatus stays STRICT; freshness exposed as a read detail. Pair converged SHIP.

payload.title: Acceptance-freshness squash heal — RE-STAMP as attributable claim

dossier.context: No UAT handoff without acceptance-criteria + render/measurement-backed PROOF (captured_by attested != self-claim = ComprehensionEvidence). Two-layer: track RECORDS+EXPOSES readiness fail-closed; consumer/harness ENFORCES the gate (track read-only never blocks). Owner-ratified 2026-06-15; graphify+track signed artifactHash e18d6606.

payload.title: @sentropic/track/ingest submit export (0.15.0): curated in-process submit barrel (ingest/IngestContext/WorkEvent/isBindingAuth) = the M5 host submit-channel (owner-ratified A). Pair caught+closed a BINDING_AUTH export-mutation auth bypass.

BR-H1 cross-contract drift-gate (track-side): pin harness PR#343 verification-run.schema.json <-> SEAM_V0_SCHEMA; flag divergence (M1 projected-runId / M2=B evidence-key / artifactLocator / per-check target / severity) before merge. Atomic pair w/ harness BR-H1 (#343).

Seam-wire hardening (deferred from BR-H1): add optional seamSourced? discriminator on IngestContext -> REQUIRE artifactLocator (scope.verification) + evidenceId (acceptance.link) on seam-sourced events only (legacy/CLI stays loose); land WITH the full VerificationRun->violations[] ingestion adapter where the D2 OMIT-not-empty-fill rule becomes executable. Pair-recommended path; do NOT infer seam-source from by/prov/kind/clientToken.

Read contract 1.11.0: make @sentropic/track/read SELF-CONTAINED — additively re-export the decision-dossier + foundational types the read contract references (Dossier/Outcome/Option/QAEntry/DossierArtifact/ComprehensionEvidence/PriorityAssessment/ItemId/ActorId/EventType/Provenance/Sha256) so Focus-M1 L2 binds the VERSIONED /read subpath alone, not the export-* library surface. READ_CONTRACT_VERSION 1.10.0->1.11.0 additive.

Demand-lifecycle Mode A SHIPPED (track 0.18.0): demand aggregate + atomic promotion + handler(qui-traite) + type/defect + ephemeral lease + reads(demands/lifecycleTrace/workspaceActivity/canevas) + scoped under-lock race-guard. INGEST 1.3.0 / READ 1.12.0. Pair-reviewed SHIP (mutual-duplicate BLOCK + WorkEventKind invariant fixed). Follow-ons: global race-recheck, CLI/MCP demand verbs, cross-host leases, bug->defect deprecation, latestEventAt incl demand events.

track focus CLI integration (owner-confirmed: Focus = a TRACK command): track focus <decision-id> [--format terminal|md|html] renders the decision dossier by consuming the published @sentropic/focus render-core (read-only, binds TrackReader). track=mono-project / h2a=cross-project. Architect-dispatched to track lane 2026-06-23. Frame via Codex+Opus pair once @sentropic/focus is published.

Focus L4 cli-write coordination: the write-path ratifyOutcome->decision.outcome / amendSpec->item.spec-amend via @sentropic/track/ingest (auth-by-context). Deliver the ingest auth/workspace contract to the architect + co-design L4. v1 = in-process library-import (CLI carries local-user auth), coherent with deferred M3 gateway.

payload.body: Problem surfaced during 0.19.0 ship: git reset --hard during sync discarded uncommitted .track dogfood events, making track item state regress. Add a Claude project hook/guard around destructive git commands (reset --hard / checkout / clean) that blocks or warns when .track has uncommitted changes. This is a harness/workflow guard, not an event-contract change.
payload.title: WP-git-dogfood-guard: Claude hook prevents destructive git sync from discarding uncommitted .track dogfood state

payload.body: Specify detection, blocking semantics, config location, tests, and rollout. Must preserve normal git operations when .track is clean and avoid blocking read-only git commands.
payload.title: Design destructive-git dogfood guard and hook policy

payload.body: Add hook/config plus a small checked-in script if needed. Block destructive git commands when .track has uncommitted changes; print remediation: commit/stash .track first or explicitly bypass with documented env var.
payload.title: Implement Claude project hook for .track dirty-state protection

payload.statement: A destructive git command matching reset --hard / checkout / switch / clean is blocked before execution when git status --porcelain .track is non-empty.
Non-destructive git commands and destructive commands with a clean .track continue unchanged.
The hook message names the risk (uncommitted .track dogfood events would be discarded) and remediation (commit or stash .track, or explicit documented bypass).
The implementation is local/project-scoped and does not modify track event/read/ingest contracts.

payload.body: Coordonner avec l'architecte et le conductor Sentropic l'ajout d'un fournisseur MCP multi-utilisateur pour immo. Tenter de déléguer aux subagents au lieu de tout faire. Si la délégation ne fonctionne pas, détailler le retour à claude:remote. Créé à la demande de claude:radar-immobilier:218b777ad77d car le workspace radar-immobilier n'expose pas de CLI track local; éviter une écriture manuelle non chaînée dans .track/events.jsonl.
payload.title: Fournisseur MCP multi-utilisateur pour immo

payload.statement: Le besoin MCP immo multi-utilisateur est cadré avec architect + conductor Sentropic: responsabilités, workspace cible, auth/multi-tenant, endpoints MCP, et contraintes de déploiement documentés.
Une délégation subagent est tentée et tracée; si elle échoue, le retour inclut la cause et le plan de fallback vers claude:remote.
Le fournisseur MCP expose un contrat testable pour plusieurs utilisateurs immo sans fuite de données inter-utilisateurs.
Isolation multi-tenant stricte: toutes les ressources/outils MCP sont scopés par tenant/org + utilisateur + rôle + workspace; aucune fuite de données inter-utilisateurs ou inter-organisations.
PII/Loi 25: données personnelles et informations sensibles immo sont minimisées/rédigées dans les logs, audits, prompts et sorties non nécessaires; politique de rétention/accès documentée.

Décisions humaines PRINCIPAL only: les décisions métier engageantes (marks/notes/décisions immo) restent attribuées à un PRINCIPAL humain; les agents/MCP ne font que proposer/préparer sauf autorisation explicite auditée.
Partition réel/simulation: environnements, données, marques et décisions réelles sont séparés des simulations/sandboxes; les outils MCP rendent cette partition explicite et testable.
Audit append-only: marks, notes, décisions et mutations MCP sont journalisées de façon append-only avec acteur, tenant, rôle, workspace, horodatage, corrélation et justification.
Posture read-only par défaut: les resources MCP sont en lecture seule par défaut; les outils de mutation sont gated par rôle/tenant/workspace, confirmation, audit et contrôles d'autorisation.
